classes.description: closed or partially scanned governed batch-contract families used during tranche selection
whole-plane scan state used to decide whether a fresh quality assessment is still required
closed-by-default governance or relocation lanes that should not be reopened casually

surfaces.nextAction: Skip CPF batch barrel families during fresh tranche selection unless master architecture scope expands.
surfaces.reopenCondition: Reopen only through fresh GC-018 when a new whitepaper target introduces a genuinely unclosed CPF surface.

surfaces.nextAction: Treat the dispatch-gate-runtime-async-status-reintake family as closed and move to fresh quality assessment elsewhere.
surfaces.reopenCondition: Reopen only through fresh GC-018 when a new EPF surface outside the closed dispatch family is explicitly authorized.

surfaces.nextAction: GEF is DONE (6/6) — whitepaper promotion completed by W59-T1 MC5. Treat GEF as closed within the current closure baseline and reopen only through fresh GC-018 if a new target introduces a genuinely unclosed GEF surface.
surfaces.reopenCondition: N/A — GEF DONE (6/6), all components closed. Reopen only through fresh GC-018 if a new whitepaper target introduces a genuinely unclosed GEF surface.

surfaces.nextAction: LPF is DONE-ready (7/7) — whitepaper promotion completed by W59-T1 MC5. Treat LPF as closed within the current closure baseline and reopen only through fresh GC-018 if a new target introduces a genuinely unclosed LPF surface.
surfaces.reopenCondition: N/A — LPF DONE-ready (7/7), no implementation gap. Reopen only through fresh GC-018 if a new whitepaper target introduces a genuinely unclosed LPF surface.

surfaces.nextAction: EPF is DONE-ready — whitepaper promotion completed by W59-T1 MC5. Model Gateway (EPF provider routing) and Sandbox Runtime (full isolation) remain formally deferred as intentionally future-facing beyond the current closure baseline.
surfaces.reopenCondition: N/A — EPF DONE-ready, no implementation gap within current closure baseline. Reopen only through fresh GC-018 if a new whitepaper target introduces a genuinely unclosed EPF surface (e.g., CVF_v1.7.3_RUNTIME_ADAPTER_HUB merge is authorized).

surfaces.nextAction: Do not open another broad relocation wave; use docs curation and publication-boundary clarification only.
surfaces.reopenCondition: Reopen only through preservation override plus fresh GC-019 and GC-039 on a dedicated restructuring branch and secondary worktree.
